summary.intent: Address review comments on PR #525 (GPG release signing), then iteratively fix new review feedback and add release verification tooling and documentation.
summary.outcome: All PR review threads resolved across multiple rounds; added verify-release.sh script, updated release-verification.md docs, and documented the two-phase release workflow in CLAUDE.md.

repo: Release workflow is two-phase: Phase 1 is prepare/tag/push (CI builds artifacts), Phase 2 is GPG-signing with YubiKey via gpg-sign-release.sh after CI finishes — agents must not attempt both in the same session.
GPG key is published at https://pen.so/gpg.asc (maintainer's personal site).
Greptile bot posts automated code review on PRs with confidence scores and prioritized findings (P1/P2).

code.finding: Under set -euo pipefail, piping gpg --import output through grep will abort the script when GPG emits lines (new signatures, subkeys) that don't match the filter. Fix: remove grep filter and use || true instead.
gpg --batch --verify with 2>/dev/null suppresses signer identity on success and diagnostics on failure — GPG stderr should be shown to the user for transparency.
SHA256 verification was silently skipped when no checksum file was found — needs an explicit warning to stderr.
--clobber flag silently overwrote existing .asc signatures — should print a NOTE listing which signatures are being replaced before upload.

workflow: Greptile review confidence score below 5/5 signals remaining unaddressed issues worth investigating even when all threads appear resolved.
Review threads can appear resolved in GraphQL queries while the Greptile summary comment still reflects outstanding issues — check the summary comment body directly.
PR review comment resolution requires GraphQL mutations (resolveReviewThread), not just REST API calls.

friction: Multiple rounds of 'Fix new comments' were no-ops because no new comments existed yet — user had to repeat the request several times as new reviews came in incrementally.
The Greptile confidence score explanation required an extra explicit question from the user before the remaining P1 issue was surfaced and fixed.
open_items: verify-release.sh GPG stderr fix was committed but the transcript ends before push — unclear if it was pushed to the PR.
The two-phase release workflow is documented in CLAUDE.md but the actual GPG-signing (Phase 2) has not been performed for any release yet.
docs/src/release-verification.md manual verification steps may need a final review pass now that the automated script is the recommended method.
